metadata.title: Our Services | Autoscuole Kiwi
metadata.description: Discover the services offered by Autoscuole Kiwi.

hero.title: Choose your Lane.
hero.subtitle: We offer complete training paths for every type of vehicle, with exam simulations and personalized lessons.

items.title: Private
items.description: Licenses AM, A1, A2, A for motorcycles and B, BE for cars. Daily theoretical courses morning and evening.

items.title: Professional
items.description: Abilitations for heavy vehicles, buses, and trailers. CQC courses for goods and people with certified trainers.

items.title: Nautical Licenses
items.description: Courses for nautical license within 12 miles or without limits, sail and motor.
